generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab"
namespace base = "http://www.example.org/base"
instance RealTimeBCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control Engineers define sensors within the BIM environment as part of device modeling, creating a unified semantic foundation for subsequent transformation steps to support real-time monitoring and data collection.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeBCSSensorData
]
instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control Engineers define actuators within the BIM environment as part of device modeling, enabling the implementation of control logic and integration into the Digital Twin for operational control of physical infrastructure."
]
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building in AECO domain encompassing entire life cycle from design through construction, operation, and refurbishment",
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator
]
instance SystemStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of system states for Facility Managers to monitor and control physical infrastructure"
]
instance PerformanceForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure performance forecasting"
]
instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes based on real-time data"
]
instance ControlActuatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control physical infrastructure via actuators based on real-time insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through continuous data integration for building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateMonitoringInsight, ControlActuatorAction
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure performance forecasting",
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceForecastingInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities facilitated by Eclipse Hono for bidirectional communication between physical and digital twins.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]
instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities facilitated by Ditto for bidirectional communication between physical and digital twins.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]
instance MDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles extract structured representations from BIM models to automatically generate deployable DT artifacts. Evolution managed via modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, adapting to operational changes.",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]
instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control Systems components",
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeBCSSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) as a geometric foundation enhanced with semantic annotations for BCS components",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication via Eclipse Hono and Ditto enables Facility Managers to interact with the deployed Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and control of physical assets."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points enables integration of custom services and analytics; DT Framework serves as a central hub coordinating roles (Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for real-time monitoring/control, DT Engineers for service integration) to facilitate bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle begins with device modeling in BIM by Building Control Engineers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate deployable artifacts. Real-time data exchange and interactive visualization support operational monitoring by Facility Managers, while modular architecture allows evolution through custom services integration by DT Engineers."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connectivity is managed through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, which handle real-time data exchange and metadata extraction (e.g., endpoint addresses), forming a central hub for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Non-functional requirements address interoperability across heterogeneous systems through standardized extension points for custom service integration, supporting scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems and maintainability via low-overhead updates."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points within the modular architecture support integration of custom services and analytics, ensuring interoperability and system extensibility."
]
